productDisplayName: Lotto  Kids-Boy Jumper  White Sports Shoes
description: A classic white Sports shoe from lotto which will provide all the support growing feet need. Great style details are combined with advanced sports shoe-making techniques to ensure the shoe is breathable and comfortable. Upper Synthetic leather upper with strategically placed overlays and perforations on the forefoot and midfoot for breathability Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar with a fabric lining for breathable comfort and snug fit Cushioned footbed for shock absorption Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Pull tab at heel Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Chunky heel Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
